title: Trying to add a custom ID when updating a NODE
gherkin:
Given there exists a "<node_type>" "A"
When the user updates the node "A" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | id  | 1234  |
Then the response should return with status code 200
And the response should NOT contain the following properties
  | key | value |
  | id  | 1234  |

Examples:
  | node_type         |
  | COMPANY           |
  | BRAND             |
  | CAR MODEL         |
  | CAR MODEL VARIANT |
  | PRICE             |
  | RACE TRACK        |
  | TRACK LAYOUT      |
  | RACING SERIES     |
  | RACING EVENT      |
  | RACING SESSION    |
  | SESSION RESULT    |
  | LAP TIME          |
  | RACING GAME       |
  | GAMING PLATFORM   |
  | MODEL CAR         |
  | MODEL CAR BRAND   |
  | MAGAZINE          |
  | MAGAZINE ISSUE    |
  | RATING            |
  | PROGRAMME         |
  | PROGRAMME EPISODE |
  | MOTOR SHOW        |
  | BOOK              |
